hero.title: Grow Your
hero.description: The modern platform for Rwandan savings groups. Track contributions, manage loans, and build community wealth—all in one secure place.
hero.demoDescription: See how easy it is to manage your Ikimina group with our platform

features.title: Everything Your
features.description: Powerful features designed specifically for Rwandan savings groups. Simple to use, secure by design.

contributionTracking.title: Contribution Tracking
contributionTracking.description: Track monthly or weekly contributions with automatic reminders and late payment indicators.

smartLoans.title: Smart Loans
smartLoans.description: Manage loans with configurable interest rates, automatic profit calculation, and repayment schedules.

memberManagement.title: Member Management
memberManagement.description: Easy member onboarding, role assignment, and individual contribution history tracking.

groupIsolation.title: Group Isolation
groupIsolation.description: Complete data privacy between Ikimina groups. Each group only sees their own data.

reportsAnalytics.title: Reports & Analytics
reportsAnalytics.description: Real-time dashboards showing total savings, active loans, profit earned, and member performance.

smartNotifications.title: Smart Notifications
smartNotifications.description: Automatic reminders for contribution due dates, loan repayments, and important updates.

exportReports.title: Export Reports
exportReports.description: Download detailed reports in PDF or CSV format for record-keeping and audits.

secureAuth.title: Secure Authentication
secureAuth.description: Bank-level security with role-based access control for Admins, Leaders, and Members.

howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.description: Get your Ikimina group running in just four simple steps

step1.title: Create Your Group
step1.description: Set up your Ikimina in minutes. Add members and define contribution rules.

step2.title: Collect Contributions
step2.description: Members contribute regularly. Track payments and send automatic reminders.

step3.title: Manage Loans
step3.description: Lend to members with interest. Track repayments and calculate profits automatically.

step4.title: Grow Together
step4.description: Watch your group wealth grow. Access reports and celebrate success together.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your group. All prices in Rwandan Francs (RWF).

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small groups getting started

paymentInfo.title: Payment Information
paymentInfo.description: To subscribe to a paid plan, send your payment via Mobile Money to:
paymentInfo.note: After payment, contact us with your transaction ID to activate your plan.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Ikimina?
cta.description: Join hundreds of Rwandan savings groups already using eKimina to build community wealth with transparency and trust.
cta.note: No credit card required • Free forever for small groups

footer.description: The modern platform for Rwandan savings groups. Building community wealth with trust and transparency.

about.title: About eKimina
about.description: eKimina is the modern platform for Rwandan savings groups (Ikimina). We help communities build wealth together with trust, transparency, and technology.
about.missionDesc: To digitize and modernize Rwandan savings groups, making financial collaboration accessible, transparent, and secure for every community.
about.valuesDesc: Trust, transparency, and community are at the heart of everything we do. We believe in empowering people to grow together financially.
about.serveDesc: From small neighborhood groups to large community organizations, eKimina serves any Ikimina group looking for a better way to manage their savings and loans.
about.securityDesc: Your financial data is protected with industry-standard encryption and security practices. We take the safety of your information seriously.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.description: Help us transform how Rwandan communities save and grow together. We're always looking for passionate people.
careers.noPositionsDesc: We don't have any open positions at the moment, but we're always interested in hearing from talented individuals who are passionate about fintech and community development.
careers.sendCV: Send your CV and a short introduction to

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Desc: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, phone number, and financial data related to your savings group activities (contributions, loans, and repayments).
privacy.s2Desc: Your information is used to provide and improve our services, manage your savings group, process contributions and loans, send notifications, and ensure the security of your account.
privacy.s3Desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure data storage, and access controls to protect your personal and financial information.
privacy.s4Desc: We do not sell your personal data. Your financial information is shared only with members of your savings group as necessary for group operations. We may share anonymized data for analytics purposes.
privacy.s5Desc: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data. You can manage your information through your account settings or by contacting us directly.
privacy.s6Desc: For any privacy-related questions, contact us at

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Desc: By using eKimina, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
termsPage.s2Desc: eKimina provides a digital platform for managing Ikimina (savings groups), including contribution tracking, loan management, penalty enforcement, and dividend distribution.
termsPage.s3Desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account, providing accurate information, and complying with your savings group's rules and regulations.
termsPage.s4Desc: eKimina is a management tool and does not provide financial advice. All financial decisions within your savings group are the responsibility of the group and its members.
termsPage.s5Desc: eKimina is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any financial losses, disputes between group members, or interruptions in service.
termsPage.s6Desc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time through your account settings.
termsPage.s7Desc: For questions about these terms, contact us at
